description: Tasks that require gathering current prices from local businesses for market research and price comparison services

tasks.title: Gas Prices Survey - Highway 101 Stations
tasks.description: Collect current gas prices (regular, mid-grade, premium) from all 4 gas stations along Highway 101 between exits 15-18. Data used for fuel price tracking app and traveler planning.

evidence_schema.description: Price display board at each station
Station name, address, and all fuel prices per gallon

tasks.title: Coffee Shop Price Comparison - Downtown Core
tasks.description: Survey coffee prices at 5 downtown coffee shops: basic coffee, latte, cappuccino, and pastry prices. Helps consumers find best value and shops understand competitive pricing.

evidence_schema.description: Menu board or price list at each location
Shop name, location, and prices for requested items

tasks.title: Grocery Store Produce Prices - Weekly Basket
tasks.description: Check prices for a standard produce basket (bananas, apples, tomatoes, lettuce, onions) at 3 major grocery stores in the metro area. Weekly price tracking for budget planning.
tasks.location_hint: 3 major grocery chains in metro area

evidence_schema.description: Price tags for each produce item at each store
Store name, item prices per lb/unit, total basket cost

tasks.title: Movie Theater Ticket Pricing - Weekend Rates
tasks.description: Collect weekend ticket prices for adult, child, and senior at Cinema Complex and Riverside Theater. Include matinee vs evening pricing and any special format surcharges (IMAX, 3D).

evidence_schema.description: Price display at box office or kiosk
Theater name and complete pricing structure

tasks.title: Fast Food Value Menu Survey
tasks.description: Compare value menu pricing at McDonald's, Burger King, and Taco Bell on University Ave. Focus on meals under $5 and any current promotions or app deals.

evidence_schema.description: Value menu board at each restaurant
Restaurant, menu items, prices, and any promotions

tasks.title: Parking Meter Rates - Business District
tasks.description: Survey parking meter rates throughout the Business District. Document hourly rates, maximum stay limits, and payment methods accepted (coins, cards, app).

evidence_schema.description: Parking meter rate displays
Location, hourly rate, time limits, payment methods

tasks.title: Car Wash Service Pricing - Local Competitors
tasks.description: Check pricing at 4 local car wash services: basic wash, full service, and any specialty treatments. Include wait times and service quality observations.
tasks.location_hint: Local car wash services within 10 miles

evidence_schema.description: Service menu and pricing at each location
Business name, location, services, prices, wait time

tasks.title: Pizza Delivery Price Check - Local vs Chain
tasks.description: Compare pizza prices for large pepperoni pizza delivery from 2 local pizzerias and 2 chain stores (Domino's, Pizza Hut). Include delivery fees and estimated delivery times.

evidence_schema.description: Online ordering screen showing prices and delivery fees
Restaurant name, pizza price, delivery fee, total cost, delivery time

tasks.title: Pharmacy Generic Drug Pricing - Common Medications
tasks.description: Check generic prices for 5 common medications (ibuprofen 200mg, acetaminophen 500mg, loratadine 10mg, omeprazole 20mg, multivitamin) at 3 local pharmacies.

evidence_schema.description: Price tags or shelf labels for each medication
Pharmacy name, medication brand, size, price per unit

tasks.title: Gym Membership Pricing Survey - Fitness Centers
tasks.description: Collect membership pricing information from 3 local gyms: monthly rates, annual discounts, initiation fees, and included amenities. No commitment required, just pricing info.

evidence_schema.description: Membership pricing display or brochure
Gym name, membership tiers, prices, fees, amenities included
